lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in good condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and several large dents. The interior is heavily worn with tears in the upholstery and broken trim pieces. The car has major mechanical issues and requires significant repairs.

Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic find! This vehicle is in good condition, offering a clean, comfortable interior and a dependable performance that makes every drive a pleasure. While you'll find some minor, typical signs of use, it has been well-cared for and is ready for its next adventure. It’s a solid, reliable choice for anyone looking for quality and value!
This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior and interior show significant wear and damage. Several mechanical components require repair and maintenance.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It currently requires significant mechanical work to be roadworthy, as the engine is running roughly and there are noticeable leaks in the transmission system. The body shows extensive rust along the wheel wells and undercarriage, along with several large scratches and faded clear coat. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with tears in the driver's seat and a non-functional climate control system. This would be an ideal project car for someone with mechanical expertise or a source for spare parts.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic repairs to be safely roadworthy. The exterior shows significant neglect, with heavy rust perforation on the rocker panels and rear wheel arches, as well as a large dent on the driver's side door. The paint is severely oxidized and peeling on the hood and roof. Inside, the cabin is in rough shape; the driver's seat has large tears in the fabric, the dashboard is cracked from sun exposure, and there is a persistent musty odor. Mechanically, the engine suffers from a noticeable misfire and several fluid leaks, while the transmission exhibits occasional slipping between gears. The suspension is worn out, resulting in loud clunking noises over bumps. This car is being sold as-is and is best suited for someone looking for a major project or a source for parts.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, the automobile has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure performance standards remain high. With a documented history of care and a sophisticated interior profile, it offers a balanced synthesis of reliability and prestige. An exceptional acquisition for those who prioritize engineering excellence and enduring value.

Hey there! 👋 I'm looking to find a new home for my trusty ride. It’s been such a reliable companion and is still in wonderful shape, ready for many more adventures! It drives like a dream and has been really well-loved over the years. If you're looking for a solid, dependable car that looks great and won't let you down, this is definitely the one for you. Let's get you behind the wheel for a test drive!

Offering a well-sorted E46 M3 featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six power plant. This high-revving naturally aspirated engine delivers exceptional throttle response via individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double-VANOS variable valve timing. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag six-speed manual transmission and a variable M differential lock for superior mechanical grip. This example has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including rear subframe reinforcement and a recent valve clearance adjustment. The suspension remains taut with refreshed bushings, while the cooling system has been overhauled to ensure thermal efficiency during spirited driving. Used car in good condition. Runs well. Clean title. Maintenance up to date.

This well-cared-for vehicle is in excellent mechanical health and presents beautifully. The exterior paint retains a high-luster finish, showing only the typical minor stone chips and light surface marks expected from regular, careful use. Inside, the smoke-free interior is remarkably clean, featuring well-preserved upholstery with minimal wear on the bolsters and a dashboard free of any sun damage or cracking. Every feature, including the touchscreen infotainment system, heated seats, and dual-zone climate control, is in perfect working order. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, supported by a comprehensive service history that documents its consistent upkeep. Having recently passed a full safety inspection and receiving a fresh oil change, this car offers a reliable and comfortable driving experience. It’s an ideal choice for a buyer seeking a turn-key vehicle that has been treated with genuine respect by its previous owner.
